items.name: 多賀谷城本丸跡（旧名下妻城）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Main enclosure ruins of Tagaya Castle (formerly Shimotsuma Castle)
en.description_en: The ruins of the honmaru (main enclosure) of Tagaya Castle, formerly known as Shimotsuma Castle. Municipally designated as a monument (historic site) by Shimotsuma City on 1977-03-22. Located in Honjō-chō.

items.name: 浅間塚古墳
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: The Sengenzuka Kofun, an ancient burial mound. Municipally designated as a monument (historic site) by Shimotsuma City on 1977-03-22. Located in Kurokoma.

items.name: 小島草庵跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: The site of the Kojima sōan, a thatched hermitage. Municipally designated as a monument (historic site) by Shimotsuma City on 1977-03-22. Located in Kojima.

en.name_en: Colored silk painting of Aizen Myōō (Rāgarāja)
en.description_en: A hanging painting of Aizen Myōō (Rāgarāja) in color on silk. Municipally designated as a tangible cultural property (painting) by Shimotsuma City on 1996-12-26. Located in Shimotsuma-hei (Ōmachi).

items.name: 木造釈迦涅槃像（寝釈迦像）

en.description_en: A wooden sculpture of the reclining Shakyamuni Buddha entering nirvana (neshaka). Municipally designated as a tangible cultural property (sculpture) by Shimotsuma City on 1986-03-31. Located in Shimotsuma-hei (Ōmachi).
A wooden standing sculpture of Amida Nyorai (Amitābha Buddha). Municipally designated as a tangible cultural property (sculpture) by Shimotsuma City on 1996-12-26. Located in Shimotsuma-bo (Tamachi).
A stone gorintō, a five-ringed memorial pagoda. Municipally designated as a tangible cultural property (structure) by Shimotsuma City on 1979-11-05. Located in Kurokoma.

items.name: 今泉不動堂
items.description: 管理者:今泉不動尊氏子総代

en.description_en: The Fudō-dō (Fudō hall) at Imaizumi. Municipally designated as a tangible cultural property (structure) by Shimotsuma City on 1996-12-26. Located in Imaizumi.

en.name_en: Documents issued by the Tagaya clan
en.description_en: Documents issued by the Tagaya clan. Municipally designated as a tangible cultural property (old document) by Shimotsuma City on 1996-12-26. Located in Shimotsuma-otsu (Kuriyama).
A den-e, an illustrated biography of the priest Shinran. Municipally designated as a tangible cultural property (old document) by Shimotsuma City on 1996-12-26. Located in Shimotsuma-otsu (Kuriyama).

items.name: 吉澤家文書
items.description: 管理者:ふるさと博物館

en.description_en: The Yoshizawa Family Documents are old documents (komonjo) classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. They were designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1996-12-26. They are located in Nagatsuka.

items.name: 親鸞御手植の菩提樹
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This bodhi tree is a Natural Monument, a type of Monument. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1977-03-22. It is located in Shimotsuma-otsu (Kuriyama).

items.name: 明空御手植の柊
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This holly tree is a Natural Monument, a type of Monument. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1977-03-22. It is located in Shimotsuma-otsu (Kuriyama).

items.name: 下妻神社の大欅
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 管理者:下妻神社氏子総代

en.description_en: This great zelkova tree is a Natural Monument, a type of Monument. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1977-03-22. It is located in Shimotsuma-otsu (Nishimachi).

items.name: 大宝八幡宮十二座神楽
items.description: 管理者:十二座神楽保存会

en.name_en: Twelve-Act Kagura of Daihō Hachimangū Shrine
en.description_en: This kagura sacred dance is an Intangible Folk Cultural Property, a type of Folk Cultural Property. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1982-01-08. It is located in Daihō.

items.name: 大町はやし
items.description: 管理者:大町はやし保存会

en.description_en: This festival music (hayashi) is an Intangible Folk Cultural Property, a type of Folk Cultural Property. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1979-11-05. It is located in Shimotsuma-hei (Ōmachi).

items.name: 平方はやし
items.description: 管理者:平方はやし保存会

en.description_en: This festival music (hayashi) is an Intangible Folk Cultural Property, a type of Folk Cultural Property. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1979-11-05. It is located in Hirakata.

en.name_en: Vermilion-Seal Land Grant of Munetō Shrine
en.description_en: This vermilion-seal land grant is an old document (komonjo) classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City. It is located in Motosōdō.

items.name: 覚　幸嶋十二郷豊田三十三郷惣高

en.name_romaji: Oboe: Kōshima Jūnigō Toyoda Sanjūsangō Sōdaka
en.name_en: Memorandum of Total Yields of the Twelve Villages of Kōshima and Thirty-Three Villages of Toyoda
en.description_en: This memorandum is an old document (komonjo) classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City. It is located in Motosōdō.

en.name_en: Stone Stupa Tablet (Itabi) of Hōkō-ji Temple
en.description_en: This stone stupa tablet (itabi) is archaeological material classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City. It is located in Shimoguri.

items.name: 絹本著色東方朔図（円山応挙）

en.name_en: Painting of Dongfang Shuo (Tōbōsaku), Color on Silk, by Maruyama Ōkyo
en.description_en: This color-on-silk painting is classified as a Tangible Cultural Property in the painting category. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1990-03-17. It is located in Ōsonogi.

This stone five-ring pagoda (gorintō) is archaeological material classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1990-03-17. It is located in Shimoguri.

en.name_en: Stone Stupa Tablet (Itabi) of Yakuō-ji Temple
en.description_en: This stone stupa tablet (itabi) is archaeological material classified as a Tangible Cultural Property. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1990-03-17. It is located in Sōdō.

items.name: 無量院の大ケヤキ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This great zelkova tree is a Natural Monument, a type of Monument. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1990-03-17. It is located in Kaiba.

items.name: 村岡柴崎古墳1号
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 管理者:村岡柴崎古墳1号管理組合

en.description_en: This tumulus (kofun) is a Historic Site, a type of Monument. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1990-10-08. It is located in Muraoka.

items.name: 村岡柴崎古墳2号
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 管理者:村岡柴崎古墳2号管理組合

en.description_en: This tumulus (kofun) is a Historic Site, a type of Monument. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1990-10-08. It is located in Muraoka.

This tall lantern (takadōrō) tradition is an Intangible Folk Cultural Property, a type of Folk Cultural Property. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1993-02-25. It is located in Muraoka.

en.name_en: Album of Meiji-Era Painters, Complete Set of 19 Works
en.description_en: This painting album is classified as a Tangible Cultural Property in the painting category. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1993-02-25. It is located in Ōsonogi.

en.name_en: Stone Carving of the Thirteen Buddhas
en.description_en: This stone carving is classified as a Tangible Cultural Property in the sculpture category. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 1996-01-18. It is located in Ikodate.

items.name: 青龍権現老樹碑
items.description: 管理者:鎌庭香取神社氏子総代

en.name_en: Old Tree Monument of Seiryū Gongen
en.description_en: This stone monument is classified as a Tangible Cultural Property in the historical materials category. It was designated as a municipal cultural property by Shimotsuma City on 2002-11-18. It is located in Kamaniwa.
